name: KHALED HUSSIEN
summary: Marketing manager with 10+ years driving revenue, demand, and online growth across the GCC and MENA. I own the full customer journey end-to-end — paid media, SEO/CRO, organic social, and brand — and make decisions on data, not opinions, reporting on CAC, LTV, ROAS, and contribution to revenue rather than vanity metrics. Hands-on across Google Ads and paid social (Meta, TikTok, Snapchat), with strong full-funnel, CRO, and CRM/lifecycle work, and a daily user of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) to automate reporting and workflows. Strong analytics foundation in GA4, Google Tag Manager, and Looker Studio. A proven leader who has built and led teams from 12 to 150+, with deep GCC market knowledge and native Arabic. Certified by Google, LinkedIn, and Coursera.
competencies: GA4, Google Tag Manager, Looker Studio

experience.title: Marketing Manager
bullets: Own marketing end-to-end across paid media, organic social, SEO, and website — mapping the full customer journey from first touch to conversion and repeat, with a consistent brand voice across all channels.
Manage and optimise paid search (Google Ads) and paid social (Meta), monitoring daily spend and pacing and adjusting in real time to hit ROI targets.
Raised conversion rate by 20% in the real estate sector through CRO: landing-page optimisation, A/B testing on creatives and audiences, and purchase-flow improvements.
Built a full visual identity for a new brand from scratch and led a rebranding for a second brand, owning brand consistency across every touchpoint.
Build and maintain GA4 dashboards, track rankings and conversions, and report monthly with clear, actionable insights; use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) to automate reporting and workflows.

experience.title: Marketing Manager
bullets: Owned revenue-focused growth across Meta, Google, and TikTok, growing market share by 30% and revenue by 20%, reporting on CAC, ROAS, and contribution rather than vanity metrics.
Cut customer acquisition cost (CAC) by 28% and improved lead quality by 35% through sharper targeting, conversion tracking, and unit-economics analysis.
Boosted lead generation by 40% in the first quarter by restructuring underperforming campaigns and reworking keywords, landing pages, and the booking funnel (paid search + SEO).
Built and maintained GA4 and Google Tag Manager dashboards for real-time KPIs, delivering weekly and monthly reporting with recommended actions.
Ran A/B tests on creatives and landing pages and built remarketing/retargeting campaigns; worked cross-functionally with sales and product to improve lead handoff.

experience.title: Marketing Manager
experience.location: Kuwait (HQ), Qatar, Egypt, UAE, KSA, Jordan
bullets: Delivered 5.2x ROAS on $300K+ annual ad spend across Google Ads, Meta Business Manager, TikTok, and Snapchat.
Directed paid media and performance marketing across the GCC and MENA, owning planning, budget allocation, daily pacing, and optimisation across F&B, hospitality, and consumer brands.
Hired, built, and led a high-performing cross-functional team of 150+, setting goals, KPI frameworks, and performance benchmarks.
Identified and briefed creators and influencers for UGC and sponsored content, keeping content aligned with campaign objectives.
Ran activations, launches, and local partnership campaigns adapted to each market and its regulations.

experience.title: Digital Marketing Manager
bullets: Owned full marketing strategy and full-funnel growth for four accounts across Africa and the Middle East, each delivering ~20% quarterly sales growth.
Ran multi-phase paid and organic campaigns adapted to each market, raising online visibility by 69% and engagement by 78%.
Oversaw organic social strategy and content calendars, ensuring brand consistency and healthy community engagement; built retention and re-engagement loops.

experience.title: Head of Performance Team
bullets: Promoted from Senior Performance Specialist to Head of Performance; led a 12-person team managing 80–150 client accounts a month at a consistent 6x ROI.
Managed a monthly ad budget exceeding $2.5M across paid social and paid search, owning media-buying strategy and budget allocation.
Set up KPI frameworks and benchmarks, mentored team members from junior to senior, and helped expand into three new markets.

experience.title: Senior Media Buyer
bullets: Delivered 5–8x ROAS across 180+ monthly accounts in the KSA real estate and restaurant sectors, managing a SAR 2.5M monthly budget with careful ROI tracking.

experience.title: Media Buyer
bullets: Ran Facebook and Google Ads campaigns end-to-end for local and regional clients: setup, optimisation, audience targeting, budget allocation, and reporting.

skills.Paid Media: Google Ads (Search, Display, Video, Shopping), Meta Business Manager, TikTok Ads, Snapchat Ads, LinkedIn Ads; daily spend & pacing management.
skills.SEO & CRO: Keyword research, on-page & technical SEO, Google Search Console, A/B testing, landing-page & purchase-flow optimisation.
skills.Analytics & Tracking: GA4, Google Tag Manager, Looker Studio, conversion tracking & event setup, attribution, monthly reporting.
skills.Organic & Content: Organic social planning, community management, brand voice, creator/influencer & UGC briefing.
skills.CRM & Automation: CRM/lifecycle, email automation, retention/win-back loops; AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for content, research, and workflow automation.
skills.Web & Other: Elementor/CMS platforms, basic HTML/CSS, basic graphic design.

certifications: Google, LinkedIn, and Coursera digital marketing credentials.
